registers.name: CCR
registers.description: DMAMux - DMA request line multiplexer channel x control register
registers.fieldset_description: DMAMux - DMA request line multiplexer channel x control register

fields.name: SOIE
fields.description: Interrupt enable at synchronization event overrun

fields.name: SPOL
fields.description: Synchronization event type selector Defines the synchronization event on the selected synchronization input:

fields.name: NBREQ
fields.description: Number of DMA requests to forward Defines the number of DMA requests forwarded before output event is generated. In synchronous mode, it also defines the number of DMA requests to forward after a synchronization event, then stop forwarding. The actual number of DMA requests forwarded is NBREQ+1. Note: This field can only be written when both SE and EGE bits are reset.

registers.name: CSR
registers.description: DMAMUX request line multiplexer interrupt channel status register
registers.fieldset_description: DMAMUX request line multiplexer interrupt channel status register

registers.name: CFR
registers.description: DMAMUX request line multiplexer interrupt clear flag register
registers.fieldset_description: DMAMUX request line multiplexer interrupt channel status register

registers.name: RGCR
registers.description: DMAMux - DMA request generator channel x control register
registers.fieldset_description: DMAMux - DMA request generator channel x control register

fields.name: OIE
fields.description: Interrupt enable at trigger event overrun

fields.name: GPOL
fields.description: DMA request generator trigger event type selection Defines the trigger event on the selected DMA request trigger input

fields.name: GNBREQ
fields.description: Number of DMA requests to generate Defines the number of DMA requests generated after a trigger event, then stop generating. The actual number of generated DMA requests is GNBREQ+1. Note: This field can only be written when GE bit is reset.

registers.name: RGSR
registers.description: DMAMux - DMA request generator status register
registers.fieldset_description: DMAMux - DMA request generator status register

fields.name: OF
fields.description: Trigger event overrun flag The flag is set when a trigger event occurs on DMA request generator channel x, while the DMA request generator counter value is lower than GNBREQ. The flag is cleared by writing 1 to the corresponding COFx bit in DMAMUX_RGCFR register.

registers.name: RGCFR
registers.description: DMAMux - DMA request generator clear flag register
registers.fieldset_description: DMAMux - DMA request generator status register

fields.name: OF
fields.description: Trigger event overrun flag The flag is set when a trigger event occurs on DMA request generator channel x, while the DMA request generator counter value is lower than GNBREQ. The flag is cleared by writing 1 to the corresponding COFx bit in DMAMUX_RGCFR register.

variants.name: NoEdge
variants.description: No event, i.e. no synchronization nor detection
